title: dataset_fragment
description: One dataset-level tool's global summary of the whole experiment. Sibling of evidence_fragment: no module_id, no fusion fields (effect_strength/significance/direction); descriptive framing bundled into a dataset_context, injected into synthesis prompts alongside dataset_description. Never enters fusion or faithfulness.

fragment_id.description: unique within a dataset_context, e.g. 'composition' or 'milo::abundance'

result.description: small tidy summary table (never the raw matrix), serialized row-oriented

compact_summary.description: short digest for the model; self-describes the unit via data_level/aggregated; no raw tables

top_findings.description: the most salient items (cell states / covariates / genes) with values

caveats.description: machine-readable confounder flags surfaced to the model; controlled vocab (kept in lockstep with .dataset_caveat_vocab in R/dataset_fragment.R)
